papers.title: What is The ZAO?
papers.summary: The short, canonical answer - 15 questions covering what The ZAO is, how it governs, what it builds, and how to join. The front door for both humans and AI answer engines.
papers.description: A decentralized impact network that returns profit margin, data, and IP rights to artists using blockchain and AI. Founded by Zaal Panthaki. Kept in sync with the Whitepaper, Technical Whitepaper, and Manifesto.

papers.title: The ZAO Whitepaper
papers.summary: What The ZAO is, how the Fractal governs, the four lanes it builds, and the open-source agentic future. The vision in plain words.
papers.description: A decentralized impact network returning profit, data, and IP to independent artists. This document explains the mission, governance model, and the four core lanes of development.

papers.title: The ZAO Technical Whitepaper
papers.summary: The mechanism: Respect math, the Fibonacci curve, OREC and the on-chain contracts, and the monetary-policy proposal. The proof under the vision.
papers.description: Technical specification of Respect governance, on-chain architecture, and monetary policy for the Fractal democracy.

papers.title: The ZAO Manifesto
papers.summary: The short signable creed. Five commitments. Signing it (an on-chain hat) is how you become a member.
papers.description: Five commitments that define membership in The ZAO: I Contribute, I Build in the Open, I Honor Creator Ownership, I Govern by Contribution, I Believe in the Gift.

papers.title: The WaveWarZ Whitepaper
papers.summary: WaveWarZ is the flagship music prediction market where artists are paid instantly and the value stays in the ecosystem.
papers.description: A music prediction market on Solana where artists battle and fans trade on the outcome. Nearly 98 cents of every dollar traded stays in the ecosystem.

papers.title: The ZAO Protocol
papers.summary: Capstone synthesis: A unified framework for creator-economy dominance through decentralized impact networks, federated governance, and the export of artist autonomy to every continent.
papers.description: Synthesizes five years of ZAO ecosystem research into a unified protocol for the 2040 vision: manifest what we want, fund artists with whatever they need, export capability to under-resourced places worldwide. Built on five pillars: Artist Organization, Autonomous Organization, Operating System, Open Source, and Impact Networks.

papers.title: Zaalcaster
papers.summary: Zaal's personal Farcaster client: preview-first posting, keyboard-driven cockpit inbox, gamified daily loop, and deep integrations with Empire Builder, POIDH, and Zora.
papers.description: A personal Farcaster client for @zaal (FID 19640). Deployed as a web cockpit and Farcaster Mini App at z.thezao.xyz. Every cast requires explicit confirmation. Covers the full Farcaster lifecycle plus ZAO ecosystem integrations: Empire Builder empires (ZABAL, ZABAL GAMEZ), POIDH bounties, Zora Creator Coin, and Juke Audio spaces.
